name: Shrimp Scampi
method: Place the shrimp in a bowl and toss with the garlic powder and Old Bay seasoning. Let sit for 10 minutes.
Cook the angel hair pasta in a pot of salted water for 5 minutes. It should be al dente. Drain the water.
Melt the butter in a skillet.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute
Stir in the shrimp and sauté for 2 minutes each side – not any longer.
Add the butter, wine, lemon juice, and half and half and stir for 2 minutes.
Place the angel hair pasta in a bowl and top with the shrimp and sauce.
Drizzle with the red pepper flakes and chopped parsley before serving.
